tasks.prompt: [Página: http://localhost:3000/] [Viewport: 1396x663] The 3 cards in the "Build habits without burning out" section have different heights because the middle card has more text. Make all 3 cards the same height regardless of content leght

activity.content: Let me find the relevant CSS for the feature cards section.
The fix is clear: `.cards` has `align-items: start` which prevents cards from stretching to equal height. Removing it (or changing to `align-items: stretch`) will make all cards equal height.
